bird.name: 藍嘴鳳冠雉
bird.summary: 藍嘴鳳冠雉（學名：Crax alberti）是哥倫比亞特有的一種鳳冠雉。牠們分佈哥倫比亞東部及南部，以馬格達萊納河為界。牠們棲息在亞熱帶或熱帶的低地潮濕森林。牠們受到失去棲息地的威脅。 參考 外部連結 BirdLife Species Factsheet （页面存档备份，存于互…

locations.name: 瓜希拉省
locations.summary: 瓜希拉省（Departamento de La Guajira）是哥倫比亞北部的一個省，位於瓜希拉半島上，省名因而得名。北臨加勒比海，東南臨委內瑞拉灣。面積20,848平方公里，2005年人口681,575人。首府里奧阿查。 1965年7…

locations.name: 马格达莱纳省
locations.summary: 马格达莱纳省（西班牙语：Departamento del Magdalena）是位于哥伦比亚北部加勒比海沿岸的一个省，首府圣玛尔塔，2018年人口为130万。 马格达莱纳省因流经的马格达莱纳河而得名。

locations.name: 安蒂奥基亚省
locations.summary: 安蒂奥基亚省（西班牙語：Antioquia） 哥倫比亞西北部省分。省會麥德林。 历史 殖民地之前 殖民地時代 地理 行政区划 安蒂奥基亚省分为9个部分。

locations.name: 博亚卡省
locations.summary: 博亚卡省（西班牙语：Boyacá）是位于哥伦比亚东北部地区的一个省，首府通哈，2018年人口为128万。 参考来源

locations.name: Serranía de las Quinchas
locations.summary: The Serranía de las Quinchas is an 860 km2 area of tropical rainforest and cloud forest in Colombia.

locations.name: 马格达莱纳河
locations.summary: 马格达莱纳河（西班牙語：Río Magdalena）是哥伦比亚境内的主要河流。它得名于圣经人物抹大拉的马里亚。 马格达莱纳河发源于哥伦比亚乌伊拉省境内的安第斯山脉，向北流淌，最终在巴兰基亚注入加勒比海，全长约1,540公里，流域面积26万…

relations.subject: 藍嘴鳳冠雉
relations.evidence: Its range used to stretch 106,700-square-kilometers; it now has a highly fragmented range, with small populations between La Guajira and Magdalena Departments south to Antioquia and Boyacá Departments with 2,090-square-kilometers. It inhabits undisturbed forest in the tropical and upper tropical zones, mostly from near sea level to but at least formerly as high as . The Serranía de las Quinchas area in the Magdalena Valley is home to the last viable population of blue-billed curassows

relations.subject: 藍嘴鳳冠雉
relations.evidence: Deforestation and hunting are the major threats. The ProAves El Paujil Bird Reserve in Santander Department was created in 2003 especially to protect one population. Captive breeding has been successful
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 藍嘴鳳冠雉

relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: 藍嘴鳳冠雉
relations.evidence: One of the threats facing blue-billed curassows is habitat loss/fragmentation
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 藍嘴鳳冠雉
relations.evidence: Habitat loss occurs from widespread use of herbicides by the Colombian government. Forests have also been cleared for agriculture, livestock, oil extraction, and mining. Around 98% to 99% of blue-billed curassow habitat has been lost. Hunting is the most immediate threat to the species.{{Cite journal |last1=Valencia |first1=Igor F
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
